case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. PITTSTOP ENTERPRISES LLC et al

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Continued To Oct-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Doughlas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Pittstop Enterprises LLC. and John Pitts as follows:
Principal $111,900.44
Prejudgment Interest $2,068.13
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Interest $4,844.28
Costs $455.00, for a total of $119,699.72
Plantiff is entitled to its immediate possession of the leased equipment listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2007 Off Calendar
